data.body: 2da6 GREEN (test hygiene, 3 files): (1) post_deletion_smoke split into a GENUINE invocability test (invokes read-only outbound probe leaf, asserts payload + get_issue called) + an honestly-named registry-linkage guard (pins exact 12 leaf pairs, all callable) — no more swallowed exceptions; (2) added behavioral schema-guided parse test ('{count:"3",...}' trailing comma -> int 3, differs from schema-less), verified installed json_repair honors schema= with a runtime skip fallback, kept forwarding test; (3) removed redundant is-not-None baseline test (nuance covered by neighbors). 17 pass, lint+typecheck clean. Committing stacked on 5977.
